name: byok-vscode-agent
description: A BYOK-only coding agent for Visual Studio Code.

scripts.compile: pnpm run compile:extension && pnpm run bundle:webview
scripts.format: prettier --write .vscode package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.extension.json tsconfig.webview.json tsconfig.eslint.json eslint.config.mjs vitest.config.ts pnpm-workspace.yaml scripts src tests resources .prettierrc.json
scripts.format:check: prettier --check .vscode package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.extension.json tsconfig.webview.json tsconfig.eslint.json eslint.config.mjs vitest.config.ts pnpm-workspace.yaml scripts src tests resources .prettierrc.json
scripts.check: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm format:check && pnpm test
